feed.title: 0xAsifShaik
feed.subtitle: Android security research, reverse engineering, and technical deep-dives by Asif Shaik.

entry.title: How Magisk Works: A Deep Dive into Android Rooting

link.title: How Magisk Works: A Deep Dive into Android Rooting

entry.summary: Introduction Magisk has become the de-facto standard for rooting Android devices. Unlike older methods that directly modified the /system partition, Magisk pioneered a systemless approach — leaving the system partition completely untouched while still granting full superuser access. But how does it actually work under the hood? In this post, we’ll break down Magisk’s architecture, from boot i...
